name: Yami RPG Editor
short_description: A flexible, high-performance 2D game creation tool that supports low-code development and advanced scripting.
detailed_description:
A tool for creating games that can handle large numbers of on-screen units. Games can run on PC, mobile, and the web.

Scene Editor

Supports various tile sizes (16–256px). Add actors, regions, lights, animations, particles, parallax images, and tile maps. Includes a built-in 2D lighting system.

UI Editor

Design UI layouts and interactions visually.

Animation Editor

Create frame-by-frame and particle animations. Supports paper doll and multi-directional animations (1, 2, 4, 8 directions).

Particle Editor

Simple and easy to use; create particle effects for weather, skills, and more.

Custom Attributes

Add custom attributes to actors, skills, states, equipment, and items. Implement functionality via events or scripts.

Features

  • High-performance; supports low-code development and TypeScript for game scripting

  • Open-source on GitHub

Games Released on Steam

  • Border Pioneer - 2346410

  • Journey to the West Survivor - 2450100

  • What a Shitty Job - 3278480

  • Moka Future - 1779760

Other

The author is currently developing a Unity game and rarely updates this editor.
